creator: andrews@TECHNOLOGIST.COM
text:
On Thu, Mar 30, 2000 at 01:45:54PM +0200, Alexander Langer wrote:
> >Description:
> 
> This port updates the lang/smalltalk port to version 1.7.3.
> I am the maintainer of this port, but I had no time and the smalltalk
> needed an update. I asked KATO Tsuguru <tkato@prontomail.ne.jp> if he
> could update the port, and he did :-)
> 
> So, please list him as submitter, when you commit it:
> 
> Submitted by:	KATO Tsuguru <tkato@prontomail.ne.jp>

This patch does not apply cleanly..:

<2 5038-0> (00-03-31 9:39:48) [will@shadow /usr/ports/lang/smalltalk]%
patch -p2 <pr-patch
Hmm...  Looks like a unified diff to me...
The text leading up to this was:
--------------------------
|
|diff -urN /usr/ports/lang/smalltalk/Makefile lang/smalltalk/Makefile
|--- /usr/ports/lang/smalltalk/Makefile Tue Mar 21 17:30:08 2000
|+++ lang/smalltalk/Makefile    Mon Mar 27 04:00:06 2000
--------------------------
Patching file Makefile using Plan A...
Hunk #1 succeeded at 1.

[...]

|diff -urN /usr/ports/lang/smalltalk/patches/patch-ac
lang/smalltalk/patches/patch-ac
|--- /usr/ports/lang/smalltalk/patches/patch-ac Tue Dec 28 06:43:32 1999
|+++ lang/smalltalk/patches/patch-ac    Mon Mar 27 04:44:37 2000
--------------------------
Patching file patches/patch-ac using Plan A...
patch: **** malformed patch at line 153: -      tcp/SocketImpl.st
tcp/TCP.st tcp/TCPSocketImpl.st \

What's going on here? I checked out a fresh copy of the smalltalk port, and
this happened again.

-- 
Will Andrews <andrews@technologist.com>

G++>+++ e->++++ h! r-->+++ y?
